name: Saturn Dignified Dasha — Enduring Authority & Fame
description: Saturn in dignity (own sign/exaltation) during its Mahadasha or Antardasha grants lasting fame through discipline, public service, and institutional authority.

source_text.quote: Saturn well-placed in own sign or exaltation during its period bestows kingship, authority over lands, and enduring public standing.

all_of: Saturn Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
Saturn is in own sign (Capricorn/Aquarius) or exaltation (Libra)

interpretation.meaning: Saturn in dignity during its period grants hard-earned, lasting fame through public service, governance, or institutional authority. The fame is slow but permanent.

metadata.notes: Saturn fame is slow, methodical, and permanent. Government honors, lifetime achievement awards.

name: 1st-10th Lord Parivartana Dasha — Self-Career Fame Exchange
description: When 1st lord and 10th lord exchange signs (Parivartana Yoga), their mutual dasha periods create powerful windows for public fame and career recognition.

source_text.quote: When lords of the 1st and 10th exchange houses, the native becomes renowned, equal to a king, and gains fame through righteous action.

all_of: 1st lord and 10th lord are in mutual exchange (Parivartana)
Dasha of either 1st lord or 10th lord is active

interpretation.meaning: The exchange between self (1st) and public action (10th) creates a powerful destiny link. During these lords' periods, the native's identity and career fuse, bringing public recognition.

metadata.notes: One of the strongest yogas for fame — self and karma merge into public recognition.

name: Gaja Kesari Yoga Dasha — Wisdom Fame & Public Honor
description: Jupiter and Moon in Kendra from each other form Gaja Kesari Yoga. During Jupiter or Moon dasha, this yoga activates to bring fame through wisdom, teaching, or spiritual authority.

source_text.quote: If Jupiter is in a Kendra from the Moon, Gaja Kesari Yoga is formed. The native becomes wealthy, intelligent, endowed with many virtues, and will be famous and splendorous.

all_of: Jupiter is in Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th) from Moon
Jupiter Mahadasha or Moon Mahadasha/Antardasha is active

interpretation.meaning: Gaja Kesari Yoga gives fame like an elephant-king — powerful, dignified, and impossible to ignore. Activates during Jupiter/Moon periods bringing public honor through wisdom.

metadata.notes: Classic yoga for fame through wisdom, spirituality, or academic excellence.

name: Sun-Mercury Dasha — Artistic & Intellectual Fame
description: Sun (fame) with Mercury (communication/art) in dasha combination activates fame through creative expression, writing, oratory, or intellectual achievement.

source_text.quote: In the period of the Sun, if Mercury is associated or aspects, the native gains fame through speech, writing, and intellectual pursuits.

all_of: Sun Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
Mercury Antardasha is active OR Mercury conjoins/aspects Sun natally

interpretation.meaning: The combination of Sun (public visibility) and Mercury (communication/intellect) creates fame through creative or intellectual channels — writing, media, art, public speaking.

metadata.notes: Artists, writers, speakers, and media personalities benefit most from this combination.

name: Rahu-Sun Dasha — Mass Popularity & Sudden Fame
description: Rahu (masses, unconventional) with Sun (authority, fame) creates sudden, explosive fame reaching large audiences. Can be controversial.

source_text.quote: In Rahu dasha, Sun antardasha, recognition from foreign kings and dignitaries, well-being in every way if Sun is in kendra or trikona from Rahu.

any_of: Sun is in Kendra from Rahu
Sun is in Trikona from Rahu
Sun is in 3rd or 11th from Rahu

interpretation.meaning: Rahu amplifies Sun's fame signification to explosive proportions. Creates sudden mass fame, often unconventional or controversial. Virality, media sensation.

metadata.notes: This is the 'viral fame' combination. Can bring both positive recognition and scandal/controversy.

name: Venus-Saturn Dasha — Authority Through Art & Service
description: Venus (art/beauty) combined with Saturn (discipline/authority) creates fame through artistic mastery, sustained creative effort, or beauty-authority combination.

source_text.quote: When Venus and Saturn mutually influence each other in dasha, the native attains high position through artistic merit and disciplined creative effort.

all_of: Venus Mahadasha or Antardasha is active
Saturn Antardasha is active OR Saturn conjoins/aspects Venus natally

interpretation.meaning: The combination of Venus (beauty/art) and Saturn (time/discipline) creates fame through sustained creative mastery. Awards, lifetime artistic recognition, institutional honor for creative work.

metadata.notes: Classical musicians, master craftspeople, and institutional artists benefit most.

name: Rasi Dasha with Benefics in 10th — Public Recognition Period
description: In sign-based dasha systems, when the active sign has natural benefics in or aspecting the 10th from it, fame and public honor flow naturally.

source_text.quote: The dasha of a rasi whose 10th house is occupied or aspected by benefics brings fame, honor from the king, and elevation in public standing.

all_of: A Rasi Dasha (sign-based period) is active
any_of: Natural benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Mercury, Moon) occupy the 10th from the active Rasi
Natural benefics aspect the 10th from the active Rasi

interpretation.meaning: When benefic planets support the 10th house from the active Rasi dasha sign, public recognition, fame, and honor from authorities flow naturally during that period.

metadata.notes: Applies to Jaimini Chara Dasha and other sign-based systems.
